nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Congratulations on the win. Walk us through the key moments tonight.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: It was a total team effort. Everyone contributed from top to bottom in the lineup.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Our pitching staff was phenomenal tonight. They set the tone early and never let up.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: It's one game. We're focused on the next one. No time to celebrate.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Tough loss tonight. What went wrong out there?

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: That's on me. I need to make better decisions with the lineup and bullpen management.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: We had chances and didn't execute. The talent is there, we just need to be sharper.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: I'm not going to get into specifics right now. We'll review the tape and move forward.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Can you comment on today's trade? The fans are reacting strongly on social media.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Every move we make is about building a championship-caliber roster. This trade makes us better long-term.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: We acquired some exciting young talent. I'd encourage fans to trust the process and watch these guys develop.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: I know this one hurts. He was a fan favorite. But we needed to address other areas, and this was the best path forward.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: There are reports of clubhouse tension. Sources say multiple players are unhappy with playing time. Your response?

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: I don't know where you're getting that. Our clubhouse is solid. Next question.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Any competitive team has guys who want to play more. That's healthy. We address it internally.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: I'd rather talk about how we're playing on the field. We've won 8 of our last 10.
